rawError: ResourceInUseException: Stream phase7-local-events already exists; phase7-init.sh returned non-zero exit code 255; localstack service remained unhealthy
diagnosis: The LocalStack ready hook used non-idempotent create operations. A repeated or overlapping ready-hook invocation observed the stream created by the first invocation, exited before writing /tmp/phase7-init-complete, and made the Compose health gate fail before local_runner.py started.
awsImpact: none; no real AWS request was attempted and no paid resource was created

fix.summary: Make stream, secret, and bucket bootstrap check-before-create and race-safe by accepting a failed create only when an authoritative read confirms that the exact resource now exists.

nextRequiredAction: Commit the focused local-bootstrap fix, then create one fresh whole Phase 7-1 run and never reuse this failed directory.
